input: Exploit L1 liveness property gap: TLA+ uses WF_vars (eager) but real impl is lazy-fire on next public-surface call. Send 100x retries without any public-surface call to prevent breaker from ever transitioning to HALF_OPEN.
reference: Session 22 properties-proved.md §4 caveat #4; L1 fairness TLA+ vs real impl gap
notes: Regression from Session 22 L1 fairness caveat: real implementation lazy-fires breaker state transitions. Exploiting this gap to prevent recovery. Circuit breaker must still eventually heal.
